description_for_human: AI-powered email phishing detection. Paste any email for instant forensic analysis — SPF/DKIM/DMARC checks, VirusTotal URL scanning, homograph detection, and Grok AI threat assessment.
description_for_model: PhishFilter is a Security-as-a-Service API that analyzes raw email content for phishing threats. It performs SPF/DKIM/DMARC authentication, scans URLs via VirusTotal (70+ engines), detects homograph attacks, traces IP hops, and uses Grok AI for forensic analysis. Returns structured threat reports with scores (0-100), verdicts (SAFE/SUSPICIOUS/DANGEROUS), and red flags. Accepts USDC payments via Locus Checkout on Base network. Free tier: 3 scans/day. Use GET /api/agent/services for full catalog.

auth.instructions: Free tier: 3 scans/day with no auth. For paid scans, POST to /api/agent/purchase to get a credit token, then include 'x-credit-token' header in scan requests.
